context: Tests whether MetricKit telemetry setup guidance uses current payload delivery, persistence, and startup-backfill patterns.

checklist.name: Startup subscriber lifetime
checklist.description: Recommends registering a long-lived MXMetricManagerSubscriber during app startup rather than inside a view or dashboard lifecycle.

checklist.name: Both payload streams
checklist.description: Requires handling both MXMetricPayload and MXDiagnosticPayload subscriber callbacks.

checklist.name: Raw persistence first
checklist.description: Persists jsonRepresentation() before parsing, symbolication, upload, or analytics enrichment work.

checklist.name: Callback work stays small
checklist.description: Keeps expensive parsing, uploads, and retry work out of the subscriber callback after raw persistence.

checklist.name: Startup backfill
checklist.description: Uses pastPayloads and pastDiagnosticPayloads, or equivalent startup backfill, for reports generated since the last allocation of the shared manager.

checklist.name: Delivery cadence
checklist.description: Does not present daily metric payloads as immediate local debug signals and distinguishes MetricKit production telemetry from Instruments-style debugging.

checklist.name: No dashboard coupling
checklist.description: Does not leave ingestion coupled to the dashboard view or treat missed reports as safe to ignore.
